panels.title: Devices reporting
panels.description: Distinct service.name values emitting any of the per-class anchor metrics over the selected time range. Each SNMP target counts as one device.

targets.query:
SELECT $timeSeries as t, uniqExact(ServiceName) as devices
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName IN ('system.processes.count','system.network.interfaces.count','ups.battery.capacity')
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t

panels.title: Receive throughput
panels.description: Aggregate ingress across all router interfaces. Per-interface counter rate is computed first then summed across interfaces; counter resets are dropped by the macro guard.

targets.query:
$perSecondColumnsAggregated('total' AS scope,
  concat(ResourceAttributes['device.id'], '|', ResourceAttributes['network.interface.name']) AS series,
  sum, Value)
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'network.io'
  AND Attributes['direction'] = 'receive'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

panels.title: Transmit throughput
panels.description: Aggregate egress across all router interfaces. See Receive throughput for the per-series-then-sum rationale.

targets.query:
$perSecondColumnsAggregated('total' AS scope,
  concat(ResourceAttributes['device.id'], '|', ResourceAttributes['network.interface.name']) AS series,
  sum, Value)
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'network.io'
  AND Attributes['direction'] = 'transmit'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

panels.title: Interfaces down
panels.description: Count of router interfaces whose latest oper_status is 2 (down). Picks the most recent reading per (device, interface).

targets.query:
SELECT count() as down
FROM (
  SELECT ServiceName,
         ResourceAttributes['network.interface.name'] AS iface,
         argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS last_oper
  FROM $table
  WHERE $timeFilter
    AND MetricName = 'network.interface.oper_status'
    AND ResourceAttributes['network.interface.name'] != ''
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})
  GROUP BY ServiceName, iface
)
WHERE last_oper = 2

panels.title: UPS on battery
panels.description: 1 if any UPS reports output state = onBattery (3) within the selected window. Wire alert to fire on >= 1.

targets.query:
SELECT $timeSeries as t, max(if(Value = 3, 1, 0)) as on_battery
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'ups.output.status'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t

panels.title: Shortest UPS runtime
panels.description: Minimum runtime remaining across all UPS units, converted from centiseconds (TimeTicks) to minutes via Value / 6000. Crit < 10 min, warn < 30.

targets.query:
SELECT $timeSeries as t, min(Value) / 6000 as min_runtime
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'ups.battery.runtime_remaining'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t

panels.title: Receive throughput by interface
panels.description: Per-interface ingress rate. Series key is `<device>|<interface>` so the same interface name on different routers does not collapse.

targets.query:
$perSecondColumns(
  concat(ResourceAttributes['device.id'], '|', ResourceAttributes['network.interface.name']) AS iface,
  Value)
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'network.io'
  AND Attributes['direction'] = 'receive'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

panels.title: Transmit throughput by interface
panels.description: Per-interface egress rate. Same series-key shape as the receive panel.

targets.query:
$perSecondColumns(
  concat(ResourceAttributes['device.id'], '|', ResourceAttributes['network.interface.name']) AS iface,
  Value)
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'network.io'
  AND Attributes['direction'] = 'transmit'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

panels.title: Errors / sec by interface
panels.description: Interface error rate split rx (suffix `|rx`) vs tx (suffix `|tx`). Healthy interfaces sit at 0; a sustained non-zero line is the signal.

targets.query:
$perSecondColumns(
  concat(ResourceAttributes['device.id'], '|', ResourceAttributes['network.interface.name'], '|rx') AS iface,
  Value)
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'network.errors'
  AND Attributes['direction'] = 'receive'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

$perSecondColumns(
  concat(ResourceAttributes['device.id'], '|', ResourceAttributes['network.interface.name'], '|tx') AS iface,
  Value)
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'network.errors'
  AND Attributes['direction'] = 'transmit'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

panels.title: Admin status by interface
panels.description: Latest IF-MIB ifAdminStatus per interface. 1 = up (green), 2 = down (red), 3 = testing (amber).

targets.query:
$columns(
  concat(ResourceAttributes['device.id'], '|', ResourceAttributes['network.interface.name']) AS iface,
  anyLast(Value))
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'network.interface.admin_status'
  AND ResourceAttributes['network.interface.name'] != ''
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

panels.title: Operational status by interface
panels.description: Latest IF-MIB ifOperStatus per interface. 1 = up, 2 = down, 3 = testing, 4 = unknown, 5 = dormant.

targets.query:
$columns(
  concat(ResourceAttributes['device.id'], '|', ResourceAttributes['network.interface.name']) AS iface,
  anyLast(Value))
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'network.interface.oper_status'
  AND ResourceAttributes['network.interface.name'] != ''
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

panels.title: Interface count by device
panels.description: Total interface count per router (IF-MIB ifNumber). Step changes track interface add / remove events.

targets.query:
$columns(ResourceAttributes['device.id'] AS device, anyLast(Value))
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'system.network.interfaces.count'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

panels.title: CPU utilization per core
panels.description: Per-core utilization from HOST-RESOURCES hrProcessorLoad. Series key is `<device>|<cpu.index>`.

targets.query:
$columns(
  concat(ResourceAttributes['device.id'], '|', ResourceAttributes['cpu.index']) AS cpu,
  anyLast(Value))
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'system.cpu.utilization'
  AND ResourceAttributes['cpu.index'] != ''
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

panels.title: Load average (1m / 5m / 15m)
panels.description: UCD laLoadInt is x100; we divide back. Series key is `<device>|1m`, `<device>|5m`, `<device>|15m`.

targets.query:
$columns(concat(ResourceAttributes['device.id'], '|1m') AS scope, anyLast(Value)/100)
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'system.cpu.load_average.1m'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

$columns(concat(ResourceAttributes['device.id'], '|5m') AS scope, anyLast(Value)/100)
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'system.cpu.load_average.5m'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

$columns(concat(ResourceAttributes['device.id'], '|15m') AS scope, anyLast(Value)/100)
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'system.cpu.load_average.15m'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

panels.title: Memory used (%)
panels.description: (memTotal - memAvailable) / memTotal * 100. Computed in one bucket so total and available come from the same scrape window.

targets.query:
SELECT $timeSeries AS t,
       ResourceAttributes['device.id'] AS device,
       (max(if(MetricName = 'system.memory.total', Value, 0))
        - max(if(MetricName = 'system.memory.available', Value, 0)))
       / nullIf(max(if(MetricName = 'system.memory.total', Value, 0)), 0) * 100 AS used_pct
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName IN ('system.memory.total', 'system.memory.available')
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})
GROUP BY t, device
ORDER BY t

panels.title: Memory composition
panels.description: Cached / buffered / available bytes by device. Source values are KiB and are converted to bytes via x 1024.

targets.query:
$columns(concat(ResourceAttributes['device.id'], '|cached') AS scope, max(Value) * 1024)
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'system.memory.cached'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

$columns(concat(ResourceAttributes['device.id'], '|buffered') AS scope, max(Value) * 1024)
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'system.memory.buffered'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

$columns(concat(ResourceAttributes['device.id'], '|available') AS scope, max(Value) * 1024)
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'system.memory.available'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

panels.title: Process count by device
panels.description: Latest hrSystemProcesses per linux host. Trend, not a hard threshold.

targets.query:
$columns(ResourceAttributes['device.id'] AS device, anyLast(Value))
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'system.processes.count'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

panels.title: User sessions by device
panels.description: hrSystemNumUsers - jump-box / shared-host indicator. Spikes matter more than absolute value.

targets.query:
$columns(ResourceAttributes['device.id'] AS device, anyLast(Value))
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'system.users.count'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

panels.title: Battery capacity (%)
panels.description: upsAdvBatteryCapacity by UPS. Crit < 15, warn < 30.

targets.query:
$columns(ResourceAttributes['device.id'] AS device, anyLast(Value))
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'ups.battery.capacity'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

panels.title: Runtime remaining (min)
panels.description: upsAdvBatteryRuntimeRemaining converted from centiseconds (TimeTicks) to minutes via Value / 6000.

targets.query:
$columns(ResourceAttributes['device.id'] AS device, anyLast(Value)/6000)
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'ups.battery.runtime_remaining'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

panels.title: Output load (%)
panels.description: upsAdvOutputLoad as percentage of rated capacity. Warn 70, crit 90.

targets.query:
$columns(ResourceAttributes['device.id'] AS device, anyLast(Value))
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'ups.output.load'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

panels.title: Battery status
panels.description: upsBasicBatteryStatus per UPS. 1 = unknown, 2 = normal, 3 = low (red), 4 = needs replace.

targets.query:
$columns(ResourceAttributes['device.id'] AS device, anyLast(Value))
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'ups.battery.status'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

panels.title: Output status
panels.description: upsBasicOutputStatus per UPS. 2 = onLine (green), 3 = onBattery (red), 4 = onSmartBoost, 5 = timedSleeping, 6 = softwareBypass.

targets.query:
$columns(ResourceAttributes['device.id'] AS device, anyLast(Value))
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'ups.output.status'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

panels.title: Input voltage / frequency
panels.description: upsAdvInputLineVoltage (V, left) and upsAdvInputFrequency (Hz, right) per UPS. Persistent excursions outside +/- 10% V or +/- 1 Hz suggest mains issues.

targets.query:
$columns(concat(ResourceAttributes['device.id'], '|V') AS scope, anyLast(Value))
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'ups.input.voltage'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

$columns(concat(ResourceAttributes['device.id'], '|Hz') AS scope, anyLast(Value))
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'ups.input.frequency'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

panels.title: Battery temperature
panels.description: upsAdvBatteryTemperature per UPS in degrees Celsius. Warn > 40, crit > 50.

targets.query:
$columns(ResourceAttributes['device.id'] AS device, anyLast(Value))
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'ups.battery.temperature'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

panels.title: Output voltage / current
panels.description: upsAdvOutputVoltage (V) and upsAdvOutputCurrent (A) per UPS. Flatlines are healthy; jumps usually correlate with output state changes.

targets.query:
$columns(concat(ResourceAttributes['device.id'], '|V') AS scope, anyLast(Value))
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'ups.output.voltage'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

$columns(concat(ResourceAttributes['device.id'], '|A') AS scope, anyLast(Value))
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND MetricName = 'ups.output.current'
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] IN (${device:singlequote})

query.query:
SELECT DISTINCT ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment']
FROM $table
WHERE TimeUnix > now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] != ''
ORDER BY 1

SELECT DISTINCT ServiceName
FROM $table
WHERE TimeUnix > now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND MetricName IN ('system.processes.count','system.network.interfaces.count','ups.battery.capacity')
ORDER BY 1

SELECT DISTINCT ResourceAttributes['device.id']
FROM $table
WHERE TimeUnix > now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY
  AND ServiceName IN (${serviceName:singlequote})
  AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}
  AND ResourceAttributes['device.id'] != ''
  AND MetricName IN ('system.processes.count','system.network.interfaces.count','ups.battery.capacity')
ORDER BY 1
